`; } // Inject auto-load script into editor after it loads document.getElementById('editorFrame').addEventListener('load', function(){ try { const win = this.contentWindow; if(!win || this.src === 'about:blank') return; // Find current image idx from title bar const title = document.getElementById('editorBarTitle').textContent; const idx2 = IMAGES.findIndex(i=>i.name===title); if(idx2 < 0) return; const src = IMAGES[idx2].src; // Wait briefly for editor JS to init then load image setTimeout(()=>{ try{ const img = new win.Image(); img.onload = function(){ if(typeof win.addImageObj === 'function') win.addImageObj(img); else { // fallback: trigger file input programmatically via fetch blob fetch(src).then(r=>r.blob()).then(blob=>{ const dt = new win.DataTransfer(); dt.items.add(new win.File([blob], title, {type:blob.type})); const fi = win.document.getElementById('fi'); if(fi){ Object.defineProperty(fi,'files',{value:dt.files}); fi.dispatchEvent(new Event('change')); } }); } }; img.src = src; }catch(e){} }, 600); }catch(e){} });
